content:
Path of Iago
The master manipulator
Student must construct a deceptive but logically sound misinterpretation of a text and defend it.


✔ New Feature: The Pardoner’s Trick – One redemption path always includes a fake, easy way out (e.g., “Pay the Pardoner XP to cleanse your sins”). If a student takes it, they are boosted instead of punished.

✅ Why This Works:
• Challenges students to think critically about choices in literature and life.
• Tests persuasive, argumentative, and analytical skills under pressure.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 133 (chunk 133/555)
